title: Post-release routing hiccup
summary: A fresh deploy left the Worker route disabled, so /health timed out until the new route was reattached.
lesson: Always confirm the interaction endpoint routes to the active worker after every publish.

title: Discord key rotation
summary: Secrets were patched without updating Worker bindings, causing signature verification failures.
lesson: Keep the Cloudflare secret mirror in sync with the Discord application key whenever you rotate credentials.

title: Permission regression
summary: A channel override removed Embed Links, and /permissions immediately flagged missing flags.
lesson: Update both bot roles and channel overrides; permission changes can silently block slash commands.

title: Environment sundown
summary: BOT_ENV was left blank in staging, causing unpredictable feature flags until the missing value was restored.
lesson: Use envcheck to validate required bindings before relying on the worker in production hits.
